svg.title: Molecular autoencoder model overview
svg.desc: Overview of the counted ECFP molecular autoencoder, its encoder-decoder bottleneck, and auxiliary training objectives.
svg.text: PubChem (~123M SMILES) and ZINC20 (~1G SMILES) records are converted to sparse counted ECFP rows, encoded into a compact latent, then decoded to reconstruct the clean fingerprint.
